name: Trolli Planet Gummi 16g (Single ball)
description:
Trolli Planet Gummi 16g (Single ball)

Looking for a fun and tasty treat? The Trolli - Trolli Planet Gummi 16g (Single ball) is just what you need! This gummy candy is shaped like a mini Earth and is filled with a delicious sour liquid center. It’s soft, chewy, and bursting with fruity flavor in every bite.

Perfect for both kids and adults, the Trolli Planet Gummi is a fun way to enjoy a sweet snack. Each ball is individually wrapped, making it great for lunchboxes, party bags, or just a little treat on the go. The realistic planet design also makes it a cool gift or novelty candy for space lovers.

At Sweets World, we bring you the best sweets from all over the globe, and this one is a customer favorite! Whether you're trying it for the first time or stocking up on your favorites, the Trolli - Trolli Planet Gummi 16g (Single ball) is sure to put a smile on your face.

Grab one today and taste the world – literally!
